name: CurvedDimensionSetHandler
summary: The CurvedDimensionSetHandler class contains operations for creating curved dimension sets.

constructors.name: CurvedDimensionSetHandler
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CurvedDimensionSetHandler class

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double)
methods.signature: public CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, PointList DimensionPoints, double Distance)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set with orthogonal reference lines from the specified points and inserts it to the database.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint1
params.doc: The first arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint2
params.doc: The second arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint3
params.doc: The third arc point to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance to be used.

returns.doc: The created dimension set or null if failed.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double, CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes)
methods.signature: public CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal CreateCurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, PointList DimensionPoints, double Distance, CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonal.CurvedDimensionSetOrthogonalAttributes Attributes)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set with orthogonal reference lines from the specified points and inserts it to the database.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint1
params.doc: The first arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint2
params.doc: The second arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint3
params.doc: The third arc point to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance to be used.

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The attributes to be used.

returns.doc: The created dimension set or null if failed.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double)
methods.signature: public CurvedDimensionSetRadial CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, PointList DimensionPoints, double Distance)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set from the specified points and inserts it to the database. Uses the default attributes.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint1
params.doc: The first arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint2
params.doc: The second arc point to be used.

params.name: ArcPoint3
params.doc: The third arc point to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance to be used.

returns.doc: The created dimension set or null if failed.

methods.name: CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase, Point, Point, Point, PointList, Double, CurvedDimensionSetRadial.CurvedDimensionSetRadialAttributes)
methods.signature: public CurvedDimensionSetRadial CreateCurvedDimensionSetRadial(ViewBase View, Point ArcPoint1, Point ArcPoint2, Point ArcPoint3, PointList DimensionPoints, double Distance, CurvedDimensionSetRadial.CurvedDimensionSetRadialAttributes Attributes)
methods.summary: Creates a curved dimension set from the specified points and inserts it to the database.
